name: a-horde-o-bees
description: Claude Code plugins for agent discipline, workflow conventions, and project navigation. Add with no ref for dev channel (tracks main); add with `@vX.Y.Z` to pin to a stable release.

plugins.name: ocd
plugins.description: Deterministic enforcement of permissions, rules, and structural conventions with agent-facing project navigation

plugins.name: progressive-skill-composer
plugins.description: Compose new skills from one or more exemplar sources via goal-driven dialogue, with PFN + progressive-disclosure authoring discipline applied automatically. Drift tracking against pinned upstream commits via non-mutating git ls-remote. Complements Vercel's npx skills (which covers individual-skill install).

plugins.name: composed-skills
plugins.description: Curated bundle of skills composed via progressive-skill-composer. Each skill carries its own composition.md (design intent + pinned source provenance). Install the bundle via /plugin install, or pick individual skills via Vercel's npx skills.
